meaning: adj.蜿ｯ髫乗慮謾ｯ蜿也噪,隸ｷ豎ょ叉莉倡噪,髫乗慮蜿ｯ蛛ｿ霑倡噪
examples: Named parameters in a JDBC callable statement.
The PMS provides a callable management interface.
A service is a callable routine that is made available over a network.
Most investors buy plain-vanilla bonds, and often the biggest wrinkle is that they are callable.
The senior preferred shares will be callable at par after three years, under the Treasury program.
